params.description: Vertical data table titled Favorite Playground Activities appears. Categories: Swings, Slides, Monkey Bars, Sandbox. Values: Swings 20, Slides 15, Monkey Bars 25, Sandbox 10.

Vertical picture graph appears in building mode. Favorite Playground Activities. Scale 5 (Each star = 5). Swings column has 4 symbols already placed. Slides, Monkey Bars, Sandbox columns empty. Key visible.

beats.text: Slides has 15. How many symbols is that?

elements.description: Vertical data table showing Favorite Playground Activities data. Swings 20, Slides 15, Monkey Bars 25, Sandbox 10.
Vertical picture graph in building mode. Scale 5. Swings has 4 symbols. Slides, Monkey Bars, Sandbox empty.

beats.text: Think: count by 5s until you reach 15. How many 5s? Click to set the height of the Slides.
Set the number of symbols for Slides.

validator.description: Student placed 3 symbols in Slides column, correct

params.description: 3 symbols appear stacked in Slides column, confirming placement.

beats.text: 3 symbols. 5, 10, 15. You used skip-counting to figure it out.
